ceremonial_identity.note: A single-use founding identity. Its only purpose was to sign the first ethos bundle of the protocol. After this declaration it holds no ongoing authority and issues no mandates.

ethos_bundle.note: A signed .ethos bundle (zip) conforming to spec §3. Its public zone contains the Birth Declaration signed by the ceremonial identity's #public sphere key.

did_document.note: Full DID document for the ceremonial identity, as produced by `aithos show aithos --json`.

name_reservations.note: Reference implementation placeholder packages published on 2026-04-19. Registry publication timestamps are the canonical public record; this JSON is the protocol-native record of the same event.

specification.versioning_policy: Breaking changes permitted on any minor-version bump until 1.0.0. Strict semantic versioning applies from 1.0.0 onward.
